description: BigOven is a cooking and recipe platform that provides access to a large recipe catalog plus grocery-list features. Its API is aimed at third-party apps and websites that want to search recipes, fetch recipe data, and work with grocery lists.
summary: BigOven exposes one documented REST HTTP surface: the BigOven Build API v2 at `https://api2.bigoven.com`, authenticated with a developer API key sent as `X-BigOven-API-Key` or `api_key` query parameter.
